steps.title: Contrast rare with common
steps.content: The previous sentence says it was relatively rare for supporters of the Underground Railroad to hide their antislavery views. The next sentence describes what supporters usually were instead: vocal abolitionists like LeMoyne.

steps.title: Remove the wrong transitions
steps.content: A suggests appropriateness, not frequency. B introduces a concession, but no point is being granted. C introduces an example, but the sentence is making a broader claim about what supporters typically did. The answer is D.
